name: Fixed-Term Employment Contract
description: An employment agreement valid for a specific period of time or until the completion of a specific project.
content:
FIXED-TERM EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT

This Employment Contract (the "Contract") is entered into on {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Employer and the Employee named below, to establish a fixed-term employment relationship under the following terms and conditions.

1. THE PARTIES

A. EMPLOYER
Company Name: {{employer_name}}
Address: {{employer_address}}
Registration/Tax ID: {{employer_tax_id}}

B. EMPLOYEE
Full Name: {{employee_name}}
ID/Passport No: {{employee_id_no}}
Address: {{employee_address}}
Phone: {{employee_phone}}
Email: {{employee_email}}

2. POSITION AND WORK LOCATION

Job Title/Position: {{job_title}}
Primary Work Location: {{work_location}}

3. TERM OF EMPLOYMENT

This Contract is for a Fixed Term.
Objective Reason for Fixed Term: {{reason_for_fixed_term}}
Commencement Date: {{formatDate start_date}}
Termination Date: {{formatDate end_date}}

4. WORKING HOURS

Standard Weekly Hours: {{weekly_hours}} hours.
Working Days: {{working_days}}
Daily Working Hours: {{daily_hours}}
Overtime: {{#if (eq overtime_allowed 'Yes')}}Overtime work may be required and will be compensated in accordance with applicable labor laws.{{else}}No overtime work is authorized unless explicitly requested in writing by the Employer.{{/if}}

5. COMPENSATION

The Employee shall be paid a {{wage_type}} salary of {{monthly_wage}} per month.
Payment Schedule: Salary will be paid on the {{payment_day}}th day of each month via direct deposit.
{{#if (eq end_of_contract_bonus 'Yes')}}Upon successful completion of the term, a bonus of {{bonus_amount}} shall be paid to the Employee.{{/if}}

6. LEAVE ENTITLEMENTS

The Employee shall be entitled to paid annual leave and sick leave in proportion to the duration of this Contract, in strict accordance with the prevailing labor laws of the jurisdiction.

7. SPECIAL CONDITIONS (If any)

{{#if special_conditions}}{{special_conditions}}{{else}}None.{{/if}}

8. TERMINATION

This Contract shall automatically expire on the Termination Date without any requirement for prior notice. Either party reserves the right to terminate this Contract immediately for just cause in accordance with applicable laws.

EMPLOYER

{{employer_name}}


Signature: _________________________

EMPLOYEE

{{employee_name}}


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: reason_for_fixed_term
fields.label: Reason for Fixed-Term (Objective)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Completion of Project X, Maternity leave cover...
